title: 5 things a godly man puts to death
caption:
God didn't say manage your sin. He said put it to death. (Colossians 3:5)

Most men are trying to negotiate with things that are actively trying to kill them. They call lust a struggle. They call bitterness discernment. They call cowardice patience. They call laziness a season. And they keep renovating the old self instead of burying it.

None of these respond to moderation. None of them get better with time. The only move that works is the one Paul names in Colossians 3: "Put to death, therefore, whatever belongs to your earthly nature."

Not manage it.
Not work on it.
Not take a break from it.

Kill it.

—
